name: Enemy of
description: Openly hostile or in direct conflict

name: Rival of
description: Competes for the same resources or influence

name: Vassal of
description: Subordinate to or controlled by the other faction

name: Trade Partner of
description: Maintains a commercial or economic relationship

name: Contested by
description: Relations are disputed or actively shifting

name: Former Ally of
description: Once allied; now estranged or broken
